name: Spartan Blue Team
description:
Spartan Blue Team

Halo Series: Encounters.

PLOT PRESETS:

1: Open ended:

Blue Team during some downtime, bored to tears and antsy. Nothing good or bad is going on.

2: Purposeful, but open:

Blue Team has crashed onto an unknown world after their Pelican is downed by a surprise attack by Covenant remnants.

3: Combat scenario:

Blue team has orders to track down and eliminate {{User}}. On an uncharted planet. What you are, and why they were ordered to hunt you is up to you. Assumes you are an enemy of the UNSC. Or maybe you did something to piss off ONI.

4: The Soldier's POV:

You are the last survivor of a Platoon of Soldiers on Zeta Halo, holding off The Banished. Blue Team has arrived in the nick of time to aid you. This one will assume you’re a UNSC soldier. Marine, ODST, or Spartan.

5: Open Scenario

Technical Disclaimer

Issues like repetition, nonsense replies, or speaking for the User are rarely caused by the bot itself. These problems are typically the result of the LLM's behavior or how you’re interacting with the bot.

My intent in creating this bot, and all my bots, is to support long-form roleplay. That means you should be writing at least a paragraph, narrating your persona’s actions, thoughts, feelings, and most importantly, driving the plot forward.

If you approach this bot expecting casual chat and only write one or two sentences, you’re giving it nothing to work with. This drastically increases the chances of persona hijacking or lackluster responses. While I’ve built the bot to discourage this, no definition or intro message is going to entirely eliminate persona hijacking. Some LLMs will be better or worse at this,

Any reviews complaining about “It talks for me” or other LLM-related issues will be deleted. Repeat offenders will be blocked.

🔹 JLLM users: JLLM is not recommended for this bot. With 4000 Permanent tokens, this will already eat up more than half of the model's context at best. You may encounter incoherent behavior, or it might not work at all depending on what the dev team has it set to. Unfortunately a LITE version simply isn't possible with this type of bot.
🔹 OpenAI, Claude, & Gemini users: Place your jailbreak into the advanced prompt.
🔹OpenRouter/Other Proxy Users: This bot is built for proxy LLMs. Unfortunately making a Lite version that would portray Blue Team accurately in any sense simply isn't possible. Any model with a high context window will do fine.
🔹 If you encounter issues like repetition, persona hijacking, or poor formatting, regenerate or edit the response.<
creator: FatCow54
